chart.title: Glaciers: change of mass of US glaciers
chart.subtitle: Cumulative mass balance of U.S. reference glaciers, relative to the base year 1965. This is given in meters of water equivalent, which represent changes in the average thickness of a glacier.

Cumulative mass balance.descriptionShort: Measured in meters of water equivalent, which represent changes in the average thickness of a glacier relative to a base year 1965.
Cumulative mass balance.citationShort: EPA based on various sources (2021) – with minor processing by Our World in Data
Cumulative mass balance.citationLong: EPA based on various sources (2021) – with minor processing by Our World in Data. “Cumulative mass balance” [dataset]. United States Environmental Protection Agency, “Climate Change Indicators: Glaciers” [original data].
